title: Infosys expects cumulative income-tax refund of ₹1, 745 crore
detailed_summary: Infosys Limited received assessment orders under Section 250 and Section 254 of the Income-tax Act, 1961 from the Income-tax Department, Government of India. The orders relate to Assessment Years 2018-19 and 2017-18, received on March 26, 2026, and March 27, 2026, respectively, and Assessment Years 2013-14, 2019-20, 2020-21 and 2021-22, received on March 31, 2026. Infosys expects a cumulative refund of ₹1, 745 crore, including interest, and is evaluating the impact on its financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

key_facts.fact: Infosys Limited received assessment orders under Section 250 and Section 254 of the Income-tax Act, 1961 from the Income-tax Department, Government of India.
The orders were received for Assessment Years 2018-19 and 2017-18 on March 26, 2026, and March 27, 2026, respectively.
The orders were received for Assessment Years 2013-14, 2019-20, 2020-21 and 2021-22 on March 31, 2026.
Infosys expects a cumulative refund of ₹1, 745 crore, including interest.
Infosys is evaluating the impact of the orders on its financial statements for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
